chunks.title: Introduction and Passover Feast
chunks.reason: Establishes the holy convocations framework and details the Passover and Unleavened Bread.

chunks.title: First Fruits and Weeks Feast
chunks.reason: Describes the wave sheaf offering, the counting to Pentecost, and the harvest gleaning laws.

chunks.title: Feast of Trumpets and Day of Atonement
chunks.reason: Outlines the seventh month festivals including the trumpet blast and the solemn day of atonement.

chunks.title: Feast of Booths and Conclusion
chunks.reason: Details the seven-day feast of tabernacles, its rituals, and concludes with Moses delivering the instructions.
